From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Squash championship held in Adelaide, Australia

| World Outdoor Championships 2012 | |
| --- | --- |
| 12th World Outdoor Bowls Championships | |

| * [v](/wiki/Template:Bowls2012WorldChampionship "Template:Bowls2012WorldChampionship") * [t](/w/index.php?title=Template_talk:Bowls2012WorldChampionship&action=edit&redlink=1 "Template talk:Bowls2012WorldChampionship (page does not exist)") * [e](/wiki/Special:EditPage/Template:Bowls2012WorldChampionship "Special:EditPage/Template:Bowls2012WorldChampionship") | | |

The **2012 World Outdoor Bowls Championship**[[1]](#cite_note-1) was held at the Lockleys Bowling Club in [Adelaide](/wiki/Adelaide "Adelaide"), [Australia](/wiki/Australia "Australia"), from 24 November to 9 December 2012.

Some of the qualifying rounds were held at the nearby Holdfast Bowling Club in [Glenelg North](/wiki/Glenelg_North,_South_Australia "Glenelg North, South Australia").

Leif Selby won the men's singles Gold and the pairing of [Alex Marshall](/wiki/Alex_Marshall_(bowls) "Alex Marshall (bowls)") and [Paul Foster](/wiki/Paul_Foster_(bowls) "Paul Foster (bowls)") took the pairs Gold.[[2]](#cite_note-2) [Scotland](/wiki/Scotland "Scotland") also won the triples but [Australia](/wiki/Australia "Australia") struck Gold in the fours and Leonard Trophy.

In the women's events [Australia](/wiki/Australia "Australia") were dominant winning the singles won by [Karen Murphy](/wiki/Karen_Murphy_(lawn_bowls) "Karen Murphy (lawn bowls)"), pairs, triples and Taylor Trophy. Only the [Scotland](/wiki/Scotland "Scotland") team managed to stop a complete clean sweep after claiming the fours.
